summary: Execute deterministic cable publishing from content edits through submodule and parent-repo push.

inputs.name: slug
inputs.description: Cable slug being created or updated.

inputs.name: intent
inputs.description: Whether the change is a new cable or update to existing cable.

inputs.name: branch_names
inputs.description: Submodule and parent-repo branch names for publish sequence.

outputs.name: publish_report
outputs.description: Structured report with scope, changes, validation, and risks.

outputs.name: git_state
outputs.description: Submodule and parent commit pointers ready for push.

outputs.name: publish_command_sequence
outputs.description: Ordered commands for validate, index build, commit, and push.

workflow_steps: Run preflight checks for parent and submodule git state.
Apply content/artifact updates with frontmatter and registry validation.
Run validation and index regeneration in the cables submodule.
Commit and push submodule first, then update and push parent pointer.

verification.smoke_test: Perform an update flow and verify report includes validation command results and both pushed commit SHAs.
